extraction.one_line_summary: JAKOBSEN Fabio won a photo-finish sprint by narrowest margin over Bennett after Cavagna's accidental solo attack from 5km forced other sprint teams to chase.
tactical_patterns: Cavagna accidentally gapped peloton exiting corner at 5km, team green-lit opportunistic stage attempt pressuring rival sprint leadouts.
Movistar descended aggressively enough post-climb to split peloton, forcing Quick-Step to abandon leadout duties for chase work.
Richeze leadout for Walscheid trumped Quick-Step's train despite starting from deeper; world-class pilot overcomes positioning disadvantage.

rider_signals.URAN Rigoberto: negative: crashed 57km out requiring medical attention and chase, compromised before first summit finish next day
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: positive: first Grand Tour stage win at 22, beat Bennett in photo after positioning deficit shows elite closing speed
rider_signals.CAVAGNA Remi: neutral: strong enough to hold 5km solo attempt when accidentally gapped, team trusted fitness to commit
rider_signals.RICHEZE Maximiliano: positive: leadout from second-tier position still delivered podium result, pure pilot quality overcomes tactical disadvantage
